ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frequency_regulations" (
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., RU for Russia) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., Russia) */,
  "serial_code" TEXT /* Interface region code (e.g., 0x15) */,
  "lowest_frequency_permitted" INTEGER /* Lowest frequency allowed in kHz */,
  "highest_frequency_permitted" INTEGER /* Highest frequency allowed in kHz */,
  "smallest_step_size" INTEGER /* Smallest step size in kHz */,
  "maximum_dwell_time" REAL /* Maximum dwell time in seconds */,
  "channel_hop_table_low" INTEGER /* Lowest channel in hop table */,
  "channel_hop_table_high" INTEGER /* Highest channel in hop table */,
  "lbt_level2" TEXT /* LBT Level 2 classification */,
  "frequency_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the frequency band */,
  "regulation_type" INTEGER /* Type of regulation (e.g., national, international, or regional) */,
  "channel_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the channel in kHz */,
  "channel_spacing" INTEGER /* Spacing between channels in kHz */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("serial_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the frequency band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency band */,
  "lowest_frequency" INTEGER /* Lowest frequency of the band in kHz */,
  "highest_frequency" INTEGER /* Highest frequency of the band in kHz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the regulation type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_levels" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access level */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the access level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, query, update) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Name of the region (e.g., RU for Russia)
Unique identifier for the frequency band
Type of regulation (e.g., national, international, or regional)
Bandwidth of the channel in kHz
Timestamp when the record was created
